title: Vairatgad Fort
tagline: Vairatgad Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Vairatgad fort is a fort situated near to the town of Wai vyajwadi in Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Vairatgad fort is a fort situated near to the town of Wai vyajwadi in Maharashtra, India. The top of the fort is very small. There are remnants of old buildings. The bastion at the entrance is dilapidated.

topPlaces.name: Kudal (Satara)
topPlaces.description: Kudal is a village in the Satara district, Maharashtra, India. It is surrounded by a river called Niranjana or Kudali.

topPlaces.name: Wai, Maharashtra
topPlaces.description: Wai (ISO: Vāī; Pronunciation: [ʋaːi] ) is a town in Satara district of Maharashtra state in India. Located on the Krishna River, Wai was a prominent town during the Peshwa era.

items.note: Kudal is a village in the Satara district, Maharashtra, India. It is surrounded by a river called Niranjana or Kudali.
Wai (ISO: Vāī; Pronunciation: [ʋaːi] ) is a town in Satara district of Maharashtra state in India. Located on the Krishna River, Wai was a prominent town during the Peshwa era.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vairatgad Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vairatgad Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vairatgad Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (78 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (72 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vairatgad Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vairatgad Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vairatgad Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Vairatgad Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vairatgad Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kudal (Satara), Wai, Maharashtra.
